title: VotePanel — Keep / Revise / Pass Vote UI
problem: After editing, the band needs to converge on which version is ready. A lightweight vote (Keep/Revise/Pass) scoped per version gives structure to 'should we ship this cut?' without requiring a group call or a long comment thread.
analysis:
VotePanel renders three vote buttons (Keep / Revise / Pass) and the current vote tally. It appears both in VersionCard rows (compact inline layout) and in the CollaborationSection Team tab (full-width layout).

Votes are per-version per-member. The current user's active vote is highlighted (amber border on selected button). Tapping a different option immediately replaces the previous vote (optimistic update via PATCH /api/clips/[clipId]/votes). Tally shown as `2 Keep · 1 Revise` in text-xs text-secondary.

Frozen clips: VotePanel hidden entirely (isFrozen prop).

All-voted-Keep detection: CollaborationSection (not VotePanel) checks if all members have voted Keep on the same version and shows the auto-freeze prompt.
successCriteria:
- Keep/Revise/Pass buttons rendered equally spaced
- Current user's vote highlighted with amber border
- Tapping another option: optimistic UI update immediately, PATCH to Postgres
- Tally shows all vote counts in text-xs below buttons
- Votes can be cast on any version (not just latest)
- Hidden (returns null) when isFrozen
- Disabled (aria-disabled) when offline (isOnline=false prop)
implementation: components/clips/VotePanel.tsx: props { versionId, currentUserVote: VoteValue|null, tallies: {KEEP:n, REVISE:n, PASS:n}, onVote: (value: VoteValue) => void, isFrozen: boolean, isOnline?: boolean }. Three button elements, aria-pressed on active. Tally below. Calls onVote on tap (parent handles optimistic update + API call).

decisions.decision: Votes are mutable — tapping a different option replaces current vote
decisions.rationale: Band opinions evolve as new versions are submitted. A member who voted Revise on v2 should be able to change to Keep on v3 without a delete-then-create flow. PATCH endpoint upserts on (clipId, userEmail) unique constraint.
decisions.recommendation: PATCH /api/clips/[clipId]/votes with { versionId, value } — upserts by user email.

knownLimitations: Vote button layout is cramped on narrow screens when all three labels are shown — consider icon-only mode below 320px
userGuide: Tap Keep, Revise, or Pass to vote on a version. You can change your vote anytime. The tally below shows what everyone thinks.
